head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland, Auckland and Coromandel Peninsula, also Gisborne
Cloudy periods. Remaining showers clearing tonight, but the chance of a shower returning tomorrow.
Waikato, Waitomo, Bay of Plenty and the central high country, also Hawke's Bay
Cloudy periods, clearing to fine tomorrow morning.
Taranaki to Wellington, also Wairarapa
Mainly fine. Areas of fog tomorrow morning.
Nelson to Westland, also Marlborough and Canterbury
Fine, apart from areas of morning and evening cloud or fog.
Otago and Southland excluding Stewart Island
Partly cloudy.
Fiordland and Stewart Island
Cloudy periods. Isolated showers, mainly tomorrow morning.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy periods.
Friday

North Island: Mainly fine. Isolated showers north of Tauranga and about the Tararua ranges.
South Island: Mainly fine in the east. A few showers developing in the west early, turning to rain later.
Saturday

North Island: Partly cloudy with isolated showers, mainly in the south.
South Island: Rain in the west and south, with heavy falls, easing. Showers elsewhere but mainly fine in the northeast.
Sunday

North Island: Showers in the south. Isolated showers elsewhere.
South Island: Partly cloudy in the south. Showers elsewhere, some heavy in the east, easing.
Chatham Islands

Partly cloudy with a few showers, clearing and becoming fine on Friday. Cloud and showers returning on Sunday. Southwesterlies, turning northwest dying out on Friday. Northerlies developing Saturday, turning southerly late Sunday.
Issued: 7:23pm Wednesday 1 Apr 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
